items.value: Recognized for driving strategic presales excellence and proposal leadership for marquee projects including LAX Airport, Denver Airport, AIIMS, ONGC, Navi Mumbai Metro, and multiple airport & government infrastructure programs, backed by strong stakeholder engagement and solution advisory capabilities.

items.md:
* Highly accomplished Security Systems Design & Presales Specialist with 13+ years of progressive experience in ELV, ICT, and integrated electronic security systems across airports, government institutions, correctional facilities, healthcare, oil & gas, and large-scale infrastructure projects.

* Demonstrated expertise in CCTV master planning, access control architecture, VMS design, intrusion detection, intercom systems, and IP-based security network infrastructure, with strong capabilities in FOV studies, control room planning, bandwidth/storage estimation, and end-to-end solution engineering.

* Proven track record in techno-commercial bid management, cost estimation, BOQ optimization, and proposal strategy development for high-value EPC, federal, and enterprise projects, consistently delivering competitive and technically compliant bid solutions.

* Extensive experience collaborating with OEMs, system integrators, consultants, and procurement stakeholders to architect optimized solutions leveraging platforms such as Genetec, Milestone, Hikvision, Axis, Honeywell, Bosch, HID, and Lenel.

* Recognized for driving strategic presales excellence and proposal leadership for marquee projects including LAX Airport, Denver Airport, AIIMS, ONGC, Navi Mumbai Metro, and multiple airport & government infrastructure programs, backed by strong stakeholder engagement and solution advisory capabilities.

items.md:
* Spearheaded end-to-end estimation and bid support for ELV / electronic security system projects, including solution design, quantity take-offs, tender and RFP review, technical compliance analysis, costing, and management approvals.

* Led solution architecture and OEM selection by evaluating project scope, specifications, and client requirements to propose technically compliant and cost-optimized ELV solutions.

* Delivered 50% improvement in bid turnaround time by streamlining techno-commercial estimation workflows, vendor coordination, and BOQ validation processes.

* Managed high-value bids ranging from USD 1 million to USD 5 million, primarily for US federal and critical infrastructure projects, ensuring competitive and technically robust proposals.

* Increased proposal participation bandwidth from approximately 1–2 bids per month to 2–3 bids per month, significantly improving business pipeline coverage.

* Reduced bid turnaround time significantly over 3 years, enabling faster response to RFPs and increased participation in strategic bidding opportunities.

* Successfully led the bid for MSC South – Midfield Satellite Concourse South Extension, LAX Airport, managing the project from pre-design tender stage to final submission and securing a USD 1.8 million order.

* Delivered a winning proposal for the San Luis Obispo Jail Security System (CCTV, ACS, PLC, and SCADA) project securing a USD 3 million contract.

* Supported multiple repeat and smaller-value project wins (USD 100K–200K) for ongoing ELV requirements at the LAX Airport region, strengthening client trust and recurring business.

Ltd. | Mumbai** * Led **proposal engineering and estimation for large-scale ELV, ICT, and AV infrastructure projects** across commercial and residential sectors. * Evaluated and optimized **BOQs, schematics, and RFP-driven technical documentation** to improve cost efficiency and technical compliance. * Owned **end-to-end costing, budgeting, and estimation** for complete ELV, ICT, and AV scopes. * Formulated proposals for diverse systems including **FAS, PA, CCTV, ACS, LAN, and integrated security solutions**. * Orchestrated **vendor and OEM engagement**, driving optimized technical-commercial offers from system integrators. * Reviewed consultant designs against **DBR standards and RFP specifications**, ensuring design integrity and bid alignment. * Delivered proposals for prestigious government projects including **AIIMS (Gorakhpur, Bathinda, Guwahati, Jammu), ONGC Kakinada, South Delhi Municipal Corporation HQ, and Agra Airport**. * Executed ELV proposal engineering for **airport projects including Guwahati and Agra**. **Proposals Engineer | 06/2016 – 12/2017 | L&T Electrical and Automation** * Managed **design estimation and bid documentation** for telecom and infrastructure EPC projects. * Drafted **technical and techno-commercial bid proposals** for large-scale project tenders. * Designed presales solutions for **CCTV, ACS, LAN, and security networking systems**. * Leveraged expertise across leading OEM platforms including **Bosch, Pelco, Axis, Samsung, Oxalis, and Honeywell**. * Engineered surveillance and security solutions for **oil & gas facilities and large infrastructure environments**. * Designed enterprise-grade **VMS ecosystems** using **Milestone, Bosch, and Pelco platforms**. * Architected **access control solutions** using **Lenel, HID, Honeywell, and Bosch**. * Designed **security LAN infrastructure**, including access and distribution switching using **Cisco CCW**. **Sr. Executive – Solution Design | 01/2014 – 05/2016 | Hikvision India Pvt.
